item.title: clawhq demo — zero-config working agent in 60 seconds
item.intent: Remove every gate between a curious person and a running agent. One command, no API keys, no Docker expertise, no messaging setup. The sovereignty story only matters to people who have experienced the product.
item.description: Ship a `clawhq demo` command that spins up a fully working agent with zero configuration. Bundled Ollama model (or fallback to mock LLM), mock messaging channel rendered in a localhost web UI, pre-loaded blueprint (replace-chatgpt-plus). The user types one command, waits ~60s, and is talking to their agent in a browser. No Telegram token, no Docker Compose knowledge, no .env files. This is the command that turns ClawHQ from an architecture into a product. Scope: (1) demo blueprint with sensible defaults and no external dependencies; (2) embedded web chat UI on localhost (extend CQ-040 dashboard with /chat route or standalone); (3) auto-pull smallest viable Ollama model if available, mock LLM fallback if not; (4) single-use ephemeral mode — demo data lives in a temp dir and is cleaned up on exit; (5) colorful terminal output showing what is happening at each step. Must work on a fresh machine with only Docker installed. PHASE 2 (post-CQ-044): add --cloud flag using DO provisioning for zero-Docker path.
